_meta.author: serafimcloud
_meta.title: Testimonial Card
_meta.description:
A versatile card component for displaying user testimonials with avatars and social links inspired by Launch UI. It supports both linked and non-linked variants, custom styling, and responsive design.

Features:
	•	Avatar with user image
	•	Name and social handle
	•	Testimonial text
	•	Optional link wrapper
	•	Gradient background with hover effects
	•	Dark mode support
